oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_version_reporting.json.description: Reports the tool's own version banner without diagnostic output: a name token followed by a three-part numeric version, a clean exit, and an empty diagnostic stream.

feature2_1_human_audit_status.json.description: Summarizes whether the dependency audit is satisfied in human-readable mode, including fully audited, partially audited, and exempted counts.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=0
format=text
conclusion=succeeded
fully_audited=7
partially_audited=2
exempted=97
stderr_lines=0

feature2_2_json_audit_status.json.description: Summarizes a successful dependency audit in machine-readable mode with conclusion, category counts, and boundary package entries.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=0
format=json
conclusion=success
vetted_fully_count=7
vetted_partially_count=2
vetted_with_exemptions_count=97
vetted_fully_first=atty 0.2.14
vetted_fully_last=tracing 0.1.33
vetted_partially_first=cfg-if 1.0.0
vetted_partially_last=unicode-bidi 0.3.7
vetted_with_exemptions_first=bumpalo 3.9.1
vetted_with_exemptions_last=winreg 0.10.1

feature3_1_human_review_suggestions.json.description: Lists low-effort review recommendations in ranked human-readable order after temporarily ignoring exemptions.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=0
format=text
recommended_action_count=97
action_0=diff proc-macro2 1.0.37 1.0.37@git:4445659b0f753a928059244c875a58bb12f791e9
action_1=inspect tinyvec_macros 0.1.0 Soveu tinyvec 81 lines
action_2=inspect matches 0.1.9 SimonSapin url, idna, and form_urlencoded 210 lines
action_3=inspect foreign-types-shared 0.1.1 UNKNOWN foreign-types 302 lines
action_4=inspect try-lock 0.2.3 seanmonstar want 380 lines
note_count=5

feature3_2_json_review_suggestions.json.description: Emits machine-readable review suggestions with grouped suggestion data and package references.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=0
format=json
top_level_keys=conclusion,failures,suggest
contains_proc_macro2=true
contains_tinyvec_macros=true
contains_safe_to_deploy=true
contains_UNKNOWN=false
contains_Soveu=false

feature4_dependency_graph.json.description: Exports the full dependency graph as package summaries including dependency edge counts and package role flags.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=0
depth=full
package_count=107
root_packages=test-project
workspace_member_count=1
third_party_count=105
dev_only_count=0
package=test-project 0.1.0 normal=6 build=0 dev=0 reverse=0 workspace=true root=true
package=proc-macro2 1.0.37@git:4445659b0f753a928059244c875a58bb12f791e9 normal=1 build=0 dev=0 reverse=1 workspace=false root=false
package=syn 1.0.91 normal=3 build=0 dev=0 reverse=3 workspace=false root=false

feature5_1_json_certification_error.json.description: Normalizes an invalid certification request into a machine-readable domain error preserving the rejected selector, the domain message, and remediation help.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=255
format=json
selector=asdfsdfs
error=not_a_foreign_package
message='asdfsdfs' isn't one of your foreign packages
help=use --force to ignore this error

feature5_2_human_certification_error.jso.description: Normalizes an invalid certification request into a human-readable domain error preserving the rejected selector, the domain message, and remediation help.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=255
format=text
selector=asdfsdfs
error=not_a_foreign_package
message='asdfsdfs' isn't one of your foreign packages
help=use --force to ignore this error

feature6_source_comparison.json.description: Compares two package revisions and summarizes the observable patch size, hunk count, and changed filenames for both plain and git-pinned revisions.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=0
package=syn
from=1.0.90
to=1.0.91
changed_file_count=6
hunk_count=9
added_lines=67
removed_lines=47
file_0=Cargo.toml->Cargo.toml
file_1=Cargo.toml.orig->Cargo.toml.orig
file_2=expr.rs->expr.rs
file_3=lib.rs->lib.rs
file_4=lookahead.rs->lookahead.rs

exit_code=0
package=proc-macro2
from=1.0.37
to=1.0.37@git:4445659b0f753a928059244c875a58bb12f791e9
changed_file_count=3
hunk_count=8
added_lines=63
removed_lines=7
file_0=ci.yml->ci.yml
file_1=fallback.rs->fallback.rs
file_2=test.rs->test.rs

feature7_version_validation.json.description: Validates a revision string and rejects malformed inputs with a language-neutral error category and domain reason.

cases.expected_output:
exit_code=2
input=1.0.1@git:00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff0011223g
error=invalid_git_hash
reason=unrecognized git hash, expected 40 hex digits

exit_code=2
input=1.0.1@git:00112233
error=invalid_git_hash
reason=unrecognized git hash, expected 40 hex digits

exit_code=2
input=1.0.1@pijul:00112233
error=unknown_revision
reason=unrecognized revision type, expected 'git:' prefix

exit_code=2
input=notaversion
error=invalid_version
reason=unexpected character 'n' while parsing major version number

_constraints.output_rule: Output must contain specific audit metadata lines for version reporting success or failure.
Output must contain specific audit metadata lines for the human-readable audit summary.
Output must contain specific audit metadata lines for the machine-readable audit summary including boundary package names.
Output must contain specific audit metadata lines for the human-readable review suggestions list.
Output must contain specific audit metadata lines for the machine-readable review suggestions list, checking top-level keys and field presence.
Output must contain specific audit metadata lines for the dependency graph export, including package summaries for the specified packages.
exact_values: package=test-project 0.1.0 normal=6 build=0 dev=0 reverse=0 workspace=true root=true
package=proc-macro2 1.0.37@git:4445659b0f753a928059244c875a58bb12f791e9 normal=1 build=0 dev=0 reverse=1 workspace=false root=false
package=syn 1.0.91 normal=3 build=0 dev=0 reverse=3 workspace=false root=false

_constraints.output_rule: Output must normalize a domain error into machine-readable format, preserving the rejected selector and error category.
exact_values: message='asdfsdfs' isn't one of your foreign packages

_constraints.output_rule: Output must normalize a domain error into human-readable format, preserving the rejected selector and error category.
exact_values: message='asdfsdfs' isn't one of your foreign packages

_constraints.input_condition: scenario='source comparison' AND mode='local' AND package='syn'
_constraints.output_rule: Output must summarize the source comparison including changed file count, hunk count, and added/removed lines.

_constraints.input_condition: scenario='source comparison' AND mode='local' AND package='proc-macro2'
_constraints.output_rule: Output must summarize the source comparison including changed file count, hunk count, and added/removed lines for git-pinned revision comparison.
Output must reject an invalid git hash (wrong length) with specific error codes and messages.
exact_values: reason=unrecognized git hash, expected 40 hex digits

_constraints.output_rule: Output must reject a short git hash with specific error codes and messages.
exact_values: reason=unrecognized git hash, expected 40 hex digits

_constraints.output_rule: Output must reject an unknown revision type (non-git) with specific error codes and messages.
Output must reject an invalid semantic version structure with specific error codes and messages.
exact_values: reason=unexpected character 'n' while parsing major version number
